spedSummary.documents: Documents: {{total}} read, {{accepted}} accepted, {{rejected}} rejected by status

qualityGate.title: SPED Quality Diagnostic
qualityGate.itemsWithoutCst: {{count}} item(s) without ICMS CST in C170 record
qualityGate.cstMissing: The CST_ICMS field (field 10 of C170) is empty in the SPED file. This field is mandatory for regular documents (COD_SIT 00/01). Without it, the system cannot generate correct ICMS rules for these items.
qualityGate.invalidNcmExplanation: Placeholder NCM does not allow generating tax exceptions by product. Update the item master in the ERP.
qualityGate.recommendationText: Fix the source ERP parameterization or ask the accounting office to review the SPED before importing. Items without ICMS CST will be grouped as "(no CST)" in the review.
qualityGate.acknowledgeLabel: I am aware of the quality issues and wish to proceed with the available data

blockM.natLine: NAT {{nat}}: official R$ {{official}} vs calculated R$ {{calculated}} (diff: {{diff}})

stepUpload.spedLabel: Drag SPED EFD files (.txt) here or click to select
stepUpload.spedSubtitle: Accepts multiple .txt files from the same CNPJ
stepUpload.spedNoRegimeNote: SPED does not report the supplier's tax regime. Rules will not be segmented by issuer regime.
stepUpload.requireNcm: Require NCM to generate rule (items without NCM will be rejected)
stepUpload.enrichNcm: Enrich NCM with NetSuite master data (prioritizes NCM from NS item)
stepUpload.paramTypeLoadError: Could not load Param Types from NetSuite
stepUpload.cbsIbsNoValidation: CBS/IBS will be processed without name validation.

ruleCard.ncmExceptionTooltip: NCM-specific rule because taxation differs from the general rule.
ruleCard.conflictTooltip: Same operation with different taxation. Decide which is correct.
ruleCard.multiSignatureTooltip: Items taxed in different ways. Check if exceptions are needed.
ruleCard.confidenceTooltip: {{score}}% of items have the same taxation. The higher, the more consistent.
ruleCard.stUpstreamTooltip: ICMS-ST already collected by the supplier. Informational — will not become a rule.
ruleCard.reductionTooltip: Calculated reduction (not official). Verify with legislation.
ruleCard.systemNote: The system does not create rules automatically. It shows how invoices were taxed to help the consultant define the correct rule.

stepCreate.lookupsNotLoadedDetail: CBS/IBS Param Types may have incomplete names. Go back to the upload screen and wait for loading before reprocessing.
stepCreate.noReformParamTypesDetail: No cClassTrib param type found in the CUSTOMRECORD_FTE_PARAMTYPE table. CBS/IBS determinations will be ignored during import.
stepCreate.someParamTypesUnrecognized: Some CBS/IBS Param Types were not recognized
stepCreate.someParamTypesUnrecognizedDetail: Check that the cClassTrib codes in the determinations exist in the NetSuite environment.
stepCreate.noParamTypesLoaded: {{count}} det(s) not validated — FTE data from NetSuite did not load. Go back and wait for Param Types to load.
stepCreate.noEnvMatch: {{count}} det(s) with suggestion not found in environment. Check CUSTOMRECORD_FTE_PARAMTYPE.
stepCreate.noSuggestion: {{count}} det(s) without CST → ParamType mapping. Requires manual selection.
stepCreate.detsWithSuggestion: {{count}} det(s) with suggestion will be sent to RESTlet (3-step attempt).
stepCreate.detsWithoutSuggestion: {{count}} det(s) without suggestion will be skipped.
stepCreate.createAnywaySkip: Create anyway — {{count}} det(s) without suggestion will be skipped

main.title: Tax Rules
main.noItemsFound: No tax items found in the XMLs
main.noItemsFoundSped: No tax items found. Check the files and filter options.
main.failedFteLoad: Failed to load FTE data from NetSuite
